chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 506 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA 2297/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 13.05.2025. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, AAG. ***************** None present for the petitioners nor any intimation received. Same was position on the last date of hearing which shows that petitioners and their counsel have lost interest to proceed with the matter. Accordingly instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PS
